## Attention/Executive {#sec-executive}

{{< include _02-06_executive_text.qmd >}}

```{r}
#| label: setup-executive
#| include: false

# Load required packages
suppressPackageStartupMessages({
  library(here)
  library(tidyverse)
  library(gt)
  library(gtExtras)
  library(neuro2)
})

# Define domains
domains <- "Attention/Executive"

# Load and process data
processor <- DomainProcessorR6$new(
  domains = domains,
  pheno = "executive",
  input_file = "data/neurocog.parquet"
)

processor$load_data()
processor$filter_by_domain()
processor$select_columns()

# Main data object
executive_data <- processor$data
```

```{r}
#| label: text-executive
#| cache: true
#| include: false
#| results: asis

# Generate text using R6 class
if (nrow(executive_data) > 0) {
  results_processor <- NeuropsychResultsR6$new(
    data = executive_data,
    file = "_02-06_executive_text.qmd"
  )
  results_processor$process()
}
```

```{r}
#| label: qtbl-executive
#| include: false

keep <- list(
  "dkefs" = c(
    "Inhibition",
    "Inhibition/Switching",
    "Inhibition Total Errors",
    "Inhibition/Switching Total Errors"
  ),
  "nabs" = c(
    "NAB Attention Index",
    "Orientation",
    "Digits Forward",
    # "Digits Forward Longest Span",
    "Digits Backward",
    # "Digits Backward Longest Span",
    # "Numbers & Letters Part A Speed",
    # "Numbers & Letters Part A Errors",
    "Numbers & Letters Part A Efficiency",
    "Numbers & Letters Part B Efficiency",
    "NAB Executive Functions Index",
    "Mazes",
    "Word Generation"
    # "Word Generation Perseverations"
  ),
  "tmt" = c("TMT, Part A", "TMT, Part B"),
  "wisc5" = c(
    "Running Digits",
    "Letter-Number Seq.",
    "Symbol Span",
    "Coding",
    "Symbol Search"
  )
)

executive_data_table <- executive_data |> dplyr::filter(scale %in% keep)

if (nrow(executive_data) > 0) {
  # Generate table
  table_executive <- TableGTR6$new(
    data = executive_data_table,
    pheno = "executive",
    table_name = "table_executive",
    vertical_padding = 0
  )
  tbl <- table_executive$build_table()
  table_executive$save_table(tbl, dir = here::here("figs"))
}
```

```{r}
#| label: fig-executive-subdomain
#| include: false

if (nrow(executive_data) > 0) {
  # Generate subdomain figure
  if (all(c("z_mean_subdomain", "subdomain") %in% names(executive_data))) {
    # Remove NA values for plotting
    data_subdomain <- executive_data[
      !is.na(executive_data$z_mean_subdomain) &
        !is.na(executive_data$subdomain),
    ]

    if (nrow(data_subdomain) > 0) {
      dotplot_subdomain <- DotplotR6$new(
        data = data_subdomain,
        x = "z_mean_subdomain",
        y = "subdomain",
        filename = here::here("figs", "fig_executive_subdomain.svg")
      )
      dotplot_subdomain$create_plot()
    }
  }
}
```

```{r}
#| label: fig-executive-narrow
#| include: false
#| eval: true

if (nrow(executive_data) > 0) {
  # Generate narrow figure
  if (all(c("z_mean_narrow", "narrow") %in% names(executive_data))) {
    # Remove NA values for plotting
    data_narrow <- executive_data[
      !is.na(executive_data$z_mean_narrow) & !is.na(executive_data$narrow),
    ]

    if (nrow(data_narrow) > 0) {
      dotplot_narrow <- DotplotR6$new(
        data = data_narrow,
        x = "z_mean_narrow",
        y = "narrow",
        filename = here::here("figs", "fig_executive_narrow.svg")
      )
      dotplot_narrow$create_plot()
    }
  }
}

# Try to load custom title from sysdata.rda
sysdata_path <- here::here("R", "sysdata.rda")
if (file.exists(sysdata_path)) {
  sysdata_env <- new.env()
  load(sysdata_path, envir = sysdata_env)
  custom_title_name <- paste0("plot_title_", "executive")
  if (exists(custom_title_name, envir = sysdata_env)) {
    plot_title_executive <- get(custom_title_name, envir = sysdata_env)
  }
}
```

```{=typst}
// Define a function to create a domain with a title, a table, and a figure
#let domain(title: none, file_qtbl, file_fig) = {
  let font = (font: "Roboto Slab", size: 0.7em)
  set text(..font)

  // Make all figure labels (Table X:, Figure X:) bold
  show figure.caption: it => {
    context {
      let supplement = it.supplement
      let counter = it.counter.display(it.numbering)
      block[*#supplement #counter:* #it.body]
    }
  }

  pad(top: 0.5em)[]
  grid(
    columns: (50%, 50%),
    gutter: 8pt,
    figure(
      [#image(file_qtbl)],
      caption: figure.caption(position: top, [#title]),
      kind: "qtbl",
      supplement: [*Table*],
    ),
    figure(
      [#image(file_fig, width: auto)],
      caption: figure.caption(
        position: bottom,
        [`{r} plot_title_executive`],
      ),
      placement: none,
      kind: "image",
      supplement: [*Figure*],
      gap: 0.5em,
    ),
  )
}
```

<!-- ```{=typst}
// Define the title of the domain
#let title = "Attention/Executive"
// Define the file name of the table
#let file_qtbl = "figs/table_executive.png"
// Define the file name of the figure
#let file_fig = "figs/fig_executive_subdomain.svg"
// The title is appended with ' Scores'
#domain(title: [#title Scores], file_qtbl, file_fig)
``` -->

```{=typst}
// #import "@preview/muchpdf:0.1.1": muchpdf
// #muchpdf(read("figs/table_executive.pdf", encoding: none))
// Define the title of the domain
#let title = "Attention/Executive"
// Define the file name of the table
#let file_qtbl = "figs/table_executive.png"
// Define the file name of the figure
#let file_fig = "figs/fig_executive_narrow.svg"
// The title is appended with ' Scores'
#domain(title: [#title Scores], file_qtbl, file_fig)
```
